mapper.select: select q.chapter_id as id, coalesce(cc.title, '未关联章节') as name, count(eq.id) as total, sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as correct, round(sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(eq.id), 2) as rate from t_exam_question eq join t_question q on q.id = eq.question_id and q.is_deleted = 0 left join t_course_chapter cc on cc.id = q.chapter_id left join t_exam_qu_answer eqa on eqa.exam_id = eq.exam_id and eqa.question_id = eq.question_id and eqa.user_id = #{userId} where eq.exam_id = #{examId} group by q.chapter_id, cc.title order by rate desc, total desc

select q.knowledge_point_id as id, coalesce(kp.name, '未关联知识点') as name, count(eq.id) as total, sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as correct, round(sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(eq.id), 2) as rate from t_exam_question eq join t_question q on q.id = eq.question_id and q.is_deleted = 0 left join t_knowledge_point kp on kp.id = q.knowledge_point_id left join t_exam_qu_answer eqa on eqa.exam_id = eq.exam_id and eqa.question_id = eq.question_id and eqa.user_id = #{userId} where eq.exam_id = #{examId} group by q.knowledge_point_id, kp.name order by rate desc, total desc

select q.chapter_id as id, coalesce(cc.title, '未关联章节') as name, count(eq.id) as total, sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as correct, round(sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(eq.id), 2) as rate from t_exam_question eq join t_question q on q.id = eq.question_id and q.is_deleted = 0 left join t_course_chapter cc on cc.id = q.chapter_id join t_user_exams_score ues on ues.exam_id = eq.exam_id and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1) join t_user u on u.id = ues.user_id and u.grade_id = #{gradeId} left join t_exam_qu_answer eqa on eqa.exam_id = eq.exam_id and eqa.question_id = eq.question_id and eqa.user_id = ues.user_id where eq.exam_id = #{examId} group by q.chapter_id, cc.title order by rate desc, total desc

select q.knowledge_point_id as id, coalesce(kp.name, '未关联知识点') as name, count(eq.id) as total, sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as correct, round(sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(eq.id), 2) as rate from t_exam_question eq join t_question q on q.id = eq.question_id and q.is_deleted = 0 left join t_knowledge_point kp on kp.id = q.knowledge_point_id join t_user_exams_score ues on ues.exam_id = eq.exam_id and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1) join t_user u on u.id = ues.user_id and u.grade_id = #{gradeId} left join t_exam_qu_answer eqa on eqa.exam_id = eq.exam_id and eqa.question_id = eq.question_id and eqa.user_id = ues.user_id where eq.exam_id = #{examId} group by q.knowledge_point_id, kp.name order by rate desc, total desc

select q.id as questionId, q.content as title, coalesce(cc.title, '未关联章节') as chapterName, coalesce(kp.name, '未关联知识点') as knowledgePointName, coalesce(q.difficulty, 'MEDIUM') as difficulty, count(eq.id) as total, sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 0 else 1 end) as wrong, round(sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 0 else 1 end) * 100.0 / count(eq.id), 2) as rate from t_exam_question eq join t_question q on q.id = eq.question_id and q.is_deleted = 0 left join t_course_chapter cc on cc.id = q.chapter_id left join t_knowledge_point kp on kp.id = q.knowledge_point_id join t_user_exams_score ues on ues.exam_id = eq.exam_id and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1) join t_user u on u.id = ues.user_id and u.grade_id = #{gradeId} left join t_exam_qu_answer eqa on eqa.exam_id = eq.exam_id and eqa.question_id = eq.question_id and eqa.user_id = ues.user_id where eq.exam_id = #{examId} group by q.id, q.content, cc.title, kp.name, q.difficulty having wrong > 0 order by wrong desc, rate desc, q.id asc limit 20

select coalesce(q.difficulty, 'MEDIUM') as difficulty, case coalesce(q.difficulty, 'MEDIUM') when 'EASY' then '简单' when 'HARD' then '困难' else '中等' end as name, count(eq.id) as total, sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as correct, round(sum(case when eqa.is_right = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(eq.id), 2) as rate from t_exam_question eq join t_question q on q.id = eq.question_id and q.is_deleted = 0
left join t_exam_qu_answer eqa on eqa.exam_id = eq.exam_id and eqa.question_id = eq.question_id and eqa.user_id = #{userId}
join t_user_exams_score ues on ues.exam_id = eq.exam_id and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1) join t_user u on u.id = ues.user_id and u.grade_id = #{gradeId} left join t_exam_qu_answer eqa on eqa.exam_id = eq.exam_id and eqa.question_id = eq.question_id and eqa.user_id = ues.user_id
where eq.exam_id = #{examId} group by coalesce(q.difficulty, 'MEDIUM') order by field(coalesce(q.difficulty, 'MEDIUM'), 'EASY', 'MEDIUM', 'HARD')

select coalesce(u.real_name, u.user_name) as name, coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) as value, case when e.gross_score > 0 then round(coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) * 100.0 / e.gross_score, 2) else 0 end as rate, e.gross_score as total, coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) as correct from t_user_exams_score ues join t_user u on u.id = ues.user_id and u.grade_id = #{gradeId} join t_exam e on e.id = ues.exam_id where ues.exam_id = #{examId} and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1) order by coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) desc, u.id asc

select segment.name as name, count(*) as value, round(avg(segment.score_rate), 2) as rate, count(*) as total, sum(case when segment.score_rate >= 60 then 1 else 0 end) as correct from ( select case when e.gross_score is null or e.gross_score = 0 then '无总分' when coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) * 100.0 / e.gross_score >= 85 then '85%-100%' when coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) * 100.0 / e.gross_score >= 70 then '70%-84%' when coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) * 100.0 / e.gross_score >= 60 then '60%-69%' else '0%-59%' end as name, case when e.gross_score > 0 then coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) * 100.0 / e.gross_score else 0 end as score_rate from t_user_exams_score ues join t_user u on u.id = ues.user_id and u.grade_id = #{gradeId} join t_exam e on e.id = ues.exam_id where ues.exam_id = #{examId} and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1) ) segment group by segment.name order by field(segment.name, '0%-59%', '60%-69%', '70%-84%', '85%-100%', '无总分')

select e.title as name, coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) as value, case when e.gross_score > 0 then round(coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) * 100.0 / e.gross_score, 2) else 0 end as rate, e.gross_score as total, coalesce(ues.user_score, 0) as correct from t_user_exams_score ues join t_exam e on e.id = ues.exam_id and e.is_deleted = 0 where ues.user_id = #{userId} and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1) order by coalesce(ues.limit_time, ues.create_time) asc, e.id asc
